subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast but recently partaken of milk, praise be unto God for thou hast become a babe nurtured at the breast of the love of God, how delightful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قریب العهد من شرب اللبن حمد کن خدا را که رضیع ثدی محبت الله گشتی چه خوش
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love of God
